zh.Roche, Hautes-Alpes, Provence-Alpes-Côte: 法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾豪-阿爾培斯洛奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri Lambert DE FLOTTE於大約1080年出生在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾豪-阿爾培斯洛奇時，他的父親Pierre Arnaud DE FLOTTE27歲，母親Béqueline INCONNUE22歲。他和Adélaïde De Comps至少有1個女兒。他去世於大約1144年享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: FLOTTE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Flotté): topographic name derived from the Old French verb floter ‘to irrigate’.
French: habitational name from a place called (La) Flotte.

variants.name: Flot
meanings: Breton: variant of Flao, a nickname from flaw ‘scatterbrained, illogical, sluggish, fearful’.
French: topographic name from Old French flot ‘uncultivated and abandoned land’, also ‘country road’.

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: Lambert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is from an Old French given name of Germanic origin, from land ‘land, territory’ + beorht ‘famous’. This was introduced to Britain by the Normans, but its frequency in Britain in later centuries owed something to immigrants from the Low Countries, and it continued in occasional use into the 18th century at least. St Lambert of Maastricht was a 7th-century saint who aided St Willibrord in his evangelical work.

variants.name: Lammert
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is from an Old French given name of Germanic origin, from land ‘land, territory’ + beorht ‘famous’. This was introduced to Britain by the Normans, but its frequency in Britain in later centuries owed something to immigrants from the Low Countries, and it continued in occasional use into the 18th century at least. St Lambert of Maastricht was a 7th-century saint who aided St Willibrord in his evangelical work.

variants.name: Lamprecht
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is from an Old French given name of Germanic origin, from land ‘land, territory’ + beorht ‘famous’. This was introduced to Britain by the Normans, but its frequency in Britain in later centuries owed something to immigrants from the Low Countries, and it continued in occasional use into the 18th century at least. St Lambert of Maastricht was a 7th-century saint who aided St Willibrord in his evangelical work.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri Lambert DE FLOTTE was born about 1080, in Roche, Hautes-Alpes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, his father, Pierre Arnaud DE FLOTTE, was 27 and his mother, Béqueline INCONNUE, was 22. He had at least 1 daughter with Adélaïde De Comps. He died about 1144, at the age of 66.

Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Adélaïde De Comps. Il est décédé environ 1144, à l’âge de 66 ans.

ko.La Roche-des-Arnauds, Hautes-Alpes, Prov: 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 하츠-알프스 라 록헤-데스-아른오드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Henri Lambert DE FLOTTE(이)가 대략 1080년 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 하츠-알프스 록헤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pierre Arnaud DE FLOTTE(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Béqueline INCONNUE(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Adélaïde De Comps(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1144년 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Adélaïde De Comps. Он умер около 1144 г. в возрасте 66 лет.
